title: eriastrum diffusum subsp. harwoodii
intro: Eriastrum diffusum subsp. harwoodii, also known as Harwood's Buckwheat or Harwood's Monkey Flower, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriastrum diffusum subsp. harwoodii include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. Eriastrum diffusum subsp. harwoodii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
